review_title: Best Marketing Cloud Management tool
description: Overall, I am very much satisfied with AdScale. It's just the best in the market right now.
author: Ayush S.
pros: It's the best marketing cloud management in the market out there and offers a lot of features like in-depth analysis, droplets, and target hits. It uses customer data and gives personalized ad recommendations reaching a large number of target audiences and increase in revenue.
cons: It's overall a great tool, just if the pricing would be a little more adequate it would be perfect. Although it's worth that pricing for the service what they provide, but it would be great if they bring their pricing just a little down.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: More transparent than competitors, requires less Admin legwork
description: - Drive higher traffic from target PPC ads - Management system that is far better than Google Ads
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: - Fairly easy to use - Have seen incredible results in running Google Ads - Keyword search function is very effective - Love ability to set a budget and do automated competitive bidding - Recommendations are manageable
cons: - Parts of the dashboard straight up don't work, mainly traffic and spend - Ads get disapproved for reasons we don't understand - Hard to get in touch with customer service with slow response times - Isn't super inexpensive, but less expensive than more of their competitors
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Decent bid & budget management software
description: I ran with Adscale for just under a year during a period when I didn't have time to manage my account hands on. During this time performance was better than had I not used Adscale.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: For the most part AdScale's platform is extremely intuitive and really took a load off of my team when we needed it most. I could set campaign or group budgets and KPIs & Adscale would do most of the heavy lifting while providing quality suggestions that could help my account performance.
cons: At the end of the day, Adscale did not provide the KPI lift that I was hoping for on most of my accounts. Additionally, while the suggestion engine provided good suggestions, I think it could have done a whole lot better.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Powerful PPC Platform Geared For Growth
description: I have a proven partner for growing Google Ad accounts that are showing some form of regular conversions. Adscale takes them to the next stage. I am also able to manage more accounts with less team members.
author: Phil B.
pros: Despite all of the customisation features offered, Adscale is actually geared around being as automated and hands off as possible for the user. Once running, it literally takes your PPC account and gets the most out of it on autopilot. The reporting, now cross channel, offers one easy place to see how your budget is being spent, what its returning and where the key points in your spend are for both growth and improvement. On top of that, Adscale support is excellent. They live your PPC journey with you.
cons: There can be temporary moments when the website crashes. I would also love a smartphone app.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: One of the best bidding management utilization tools
description: AdScale you will take your PCC performance to the next level. You will save a ton of time instead of bidding manually, at the end of the day AdScale will manage your bids better.
author: Jovan M.
pros: With AdScale we improved our performance on AdWords drastically, especially on the search network. What I like the most about this tool is smart bid & budget management. You can see what you are missing according to sufficient budget, where to improve performance, and how to do that. If you are working with a large number of campaigns in the AdScale you can create campaign groups which can be related to your campaign goals, markets, business verticals etc.
cons: UI sections in the system interface can be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Extremely professional, quick & feels like I found real partners
description: Scaling up marketing voice in a cost-effective way
author: Guy Y.
pros: Tailor-made features, amazing reporting&alerting system, smart bidding, long-term approach to data, multi-conversion abilities, availability time is 100%.
cons: Ads optimization, but in development. Lack of integration with second tier channels like Twitter and Yahoo.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Where many have tried and fallen short AdScale has excelled
description: You've been listening to my verbal rants at other platforms obviously! *Turns off Mics on Google Home devices* :|
author: Brodie R.
pros: Clear focus on UX that neither dumbs down your experience nor overwhelms for those who may be new to the PPC platform experience. It was the most seamless integration of my adsense, FB pixel, product catalogue, audiences and any other integration I could ask for. No code snipets placed in headers no back and forth between help docs and implementation. Literally from start to launch was under 10 mins if that.
cons: I'll let you know when I find some (only been using for 24-48 hours)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Ad Expert
author: VISHWAVIJAY R.
pros: I have been using AdScale since 4months now and my company has seen an exponential increase in 360-degree growth. Decreased cost per conversion has lead to an increased ROI of more than 80%. Automated Budget management, better report analytics, and powerful dashboard are few of the general features. Time Saved! Effort Saved! Money almost getting doubled! Few of the best options available in the market.
cons: Cross-account budget optimization feature could have been better. Bidding should have even more accuracy.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I use AdScale for my site - jewish.shop
description: Really great. I used to work with the software with my client from the past - now with my company jewish.shop - I went back to using the software
author: itamar B.
pros: Excellent support (by [SENSITIVE CONTENT HIDDEN] and the rest of the team) Convenient use Create ads quickly
cons: Do not think of anything ... Maybe it should be cheaper (:
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Professional
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Their automatic recommendations are THE best. It really cuts your workday in half. I used it for Bid Automation based on clicks.
cons: If they added a simple integration with Twitter (my main platform), it would have been an A+, but it still isn't bad.
author_industry: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great boost for working ads.
author: Lee C.
pros: One stop shop - The ease of creating new ads, simplified and centralized analytics
cons: Google Ads ad setup lacks a few features - such as sitelinks and extensions. However, the AdScale team quickly added those from their side on my request.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: just got started

pros: it looks promise , very happy with the support and customer service
cons: i couldn't crop images inside the software
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: AdScale Review
description: I am very satisfied from my first encounter with this brilliant AI software
author: Dor J.
pros: The Concept, The Price, The Customer service , the ease of use etc
cons: Not Enough Using Time to answer But if i have to i would go with low PPC management options
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: My Digital Marketing journey with Adscale
author: Jonathan S.
pros: Setup was a breeze and the frequent updates ensure your campaigns are running and are constantly optimized. Reporting data was very clear detailed and concise.
cons: Could improve on customer service and adding a few more features like competitor campaigns.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: AdScale is a great app that help you optimize your Google Adwords campaigns with ease
author: Roey B.
pros: 1.Reports - Adwords platforms gives you zero advanteges comparing to the Adscale reporting (report scheduling, easy to understand & compare) 2.Auto bid management & Budget utilization - it dosent matter if your a pro or ameteur at adwords this will take at least 60% of your day to day work and lets you put your attention to the other 40% (ads copy etc) 3. Recommendations - lets you know what your missing, things that the human eye cant see at a glance.
cons: Actually the cons are things that i know the developing team is working on so its a con that will turn in to a pro in the near future: The system misses on alerts that lets you know if the credit carf is expired or if the ads arent approved and so on.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Watch out! Predatory Company - Be careful
description: WATCH OUT! PREDATORY COMPANY! Once you install the app it charges your account $290/month! And will continue to charge you until you uninstall the app. Took us a few days to figure out how to uninstall (app redirects to their page).Services were not useful for us, and software is not unique or add any significant value, lots of marketing speak with not a lot of actual function, also was charged for a year without using adscale services. Never offered a refund.
author: Jerad H.
pros: segmentation, ad automation, really not too much. Our ads never performed
cons: does not lead to conversions, no actual value, no substance or features in actual software, nothing unique
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Be aware of the shiny object syndrome!
description: The customer support is next to none, i asked multiple questions in the APP chats and never got an answer, i also never agreed to when i will be billed and to my surprise i was charged the app fee without notice. Once the trial ended I finally got support (After they charged of course) and the support through email was vague and felt hostile. Most of my questions were never answered or I had to remind the person 3 times to get an answer. I would not recommend it unless you have a large budget and a dedicated advertising manager.
author: Mikas A.
pros: Easy to install, nice stats page, interesting insights on customers
cons: I paid up to $4.75 per click on Facebook for a supposedly optimized campaign, after 10 days of usage the Google Shopping + Search was still inactive and while they provided excuses on why no solution where found.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Wow ad management software
author: Verified Reviewer

cons: The customer service system needs to be on prompt and responsive
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

cons: I don’t have any complaints. So far it is amazing.
